blocks.text: Miami Open Headlines Monday as Norway's Spring Classics Riders Roll On

Six Norwegian riders — Abrahamsen, Leknessund and Bystrøm among them — are deep in the Spring Classics campaign. Monday is the quiet act before Tuesday's Champions League explosion, headlined by Bodø/Glimt's historic Lisbon showdown.
🎾 Miami Open — World's top players battle Florida's elite ATP Masters 1000 and WTA 1000 hardcourt stages
⚽ Wolverhampton Wanderers at Brentford — Mid-table Premier League encounter rounds out a light Monday card
